sections.paragraph:
(“sanctuary”), [Kedesh], pr.n.-

(1) of a town in the southern region of the tribe of Judah, Jos 15:23.-(2) of another in the tribe of Naphtali, Jos 12:22 19:37 21:32 Jud. 4:6 1Ch 6:61 with ה parag. קֵדְשָׁה Jud. 4:9 and קְדֵשָׁה Jud. 4:10 .-(3) of a town in the tribe of Issachar, 1Ch 6:57 also called קְשִׁיֹון Jos 19:20 21:28 .
